_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: In addition, HCQ significantly augmented the CYP1B1 gene expression in both HEFs and NFFs, as did FICZ (positive control)
details: 50 μM HCQ significantly augmented CYP1B1 gene expression in both HEFs and NFFs
